snippet.title: Hurricane - LOCO LOCO - Serbia рҹҮ·рҹҮё  - Official Music Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Hurricane will represent Serbia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song LOCO LOCO.
-
Composer: Nemanja AntoniДҮ
Lyrics: Sanja VuДҚiДҮ
Arrangement: Nemanja AntoniДҮ, Darko Dimitrov
-
Lyrics:
Nemoj da se ljutiЕЎ, hrabrost skupi
Jedna cura kao ja ne traЕҫi obeДҮanja
Ne skidaЕЎ taj pogled ti sa mene
Lako uЕЎla sam ja u tvoje vene

Osmeh tvoj mi kaЕҫe
Da me ЕҫeliЕЎ koga laЕҫeЕЎ
Slatka kao ДҮoko moko
Hajde budi loco

Ram ba-ba-bam
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biЕҫe lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

Baby, baby, baby, ДҚemu drama
Jedna cura kao ja ne traЕҫi obeДҮanja
Baby, baby, baby, igram sama
To ЕЎto nisi sa mnom to je tvoja mana

Osmeh tvoj mi kaЕҫe
Da me ЕҫeliЕЎ koga laЕҫeЕЎ
Slatka kao ДҚoko moko
Hajde budi loco

1, 2... Girls, Come on!
Loco loco
Loco loco
Loco loco

Ne skidaЕЎ pogled sa mene
Lako sam ti uЕЎla u vene
Hajde budi loco loco

A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biДҮe lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biДҮe lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

-

Tekst :

Verse 1 (Jostra)

U gradu je kriminal, lova je u firmama
Bebe nose minival - braДҮa nose kilogram
Kola ot Bulgaria - Еҫivim sa gorilama
Roba prva ruka, letim Kosovo-Bolivija

Dok piЕЎamo uz vetar (uu uU)
Pijemo uz JuЕҫni vetar (uu uu)
Vodim igru kao Petar MaraЕЎ (uu uu)
Nisi brЕҫi nego metak, kalaЕЎ (uu uu) 

Ratata, 24 karata
Oko vrata i za brata oko ruke zlatan sat
Na ulici - ljubi brat, ovo ti je juЕҫni gas
Ovo nije Е vajcarska, Balkan bure baruta

Hook:

Uspeh i moДҮ
Nocas ne ДҚekaj me ja ti neДҮu doДҮ
Uspeh i moДҮ 
Sve ЕЎto doД‘e mi za dan to ode mi za noДҮ
Uspeh i moДҮ
I samo pare leДҚe ovu bol
juЕҫni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

Verse 2 (Eldorado)

Jajare misle da menjaju svet
samo na rafalno hekler je 5
prenecu kofer i dobijaЕЎ ket
sad sam na granici zovem za pet
naЕЎa gerila je spremna do zuba
cistimo teren ko da smo UDBA
metkovi kamate kurve i gudra
brza frizura i devetka duga
nece ni Bog viЕЎe da sudi
pravo kroz staklo metak u grudi
nocu se ЕЎibamo danju smo budni
sanduci borbene opreme puni
cetiri je strane sveta
veliki izbor nema ЕЎta
ja kod mene dva paketa
Nek mi sudi 92


Hook:

Uspeh i moc 
Nocas ne cekaj me ja ti necu doc
Uspeh i moc 
Sve ЕЎto dodje mi za dan to ode mi za noc
Uspeh i moc 
I samo pare lece ovu bol
juЕҫni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвҖӢвҖӢ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-вҖӢвҖӢ...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвҖӢвҖӢ...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвҖӢвҖӢ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвҖӢвҖӢ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвҖӢвҖӢ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвҖӢвҖӢ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвҖӢвҖӢ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвҖӢвҖӢ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвҖӢ #FutureNostalgiaвҖӢ #Grammys

Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвҖӢ #FutureNostalgiaвҖӢ #Grammys

snippet.title: ROSГү - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
ItвҖҷs funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your goldвҖҷs just plastic

Every day every night
IвҖҷve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me IвҖҷm never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though (YouвҖҷre running out of time)

My worldвҖҷs been hectic seems electric
But IвҖҷve been waking up with your voice in my head
And IвҖҷm trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute IвҖҷm without you I regret it

Every day every night
IвҖҷve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me IвҖҷm never coming down

Everything I need is on the

Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though (YouвҖҷre running out of time)

IвҖҷm way up in the clouds
And they say IвҖҷve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though

On the ground

Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryвҖҷs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonвҖҷt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

snippet.title: Oko: Novak ДҗokoviДҮ - niko i nikad kao on
snippet.description:
Dan kad je Novak postao najbolji teniser u istoriji

Kada je pre 13 godina Novak sa svojih 20 prvi put osvojio grend slem nismo ni sanjali da je moguДҮe da ДҮe ih osvoji joЕЎ najmanje 17. Ili kada je, pre 10 godina i prvog osvojenog Vimbldona ДҗokoviДҮ zapoДҚeo svoju prvu nedelju na vrhu ATP liste ko je mogao da pomisli da ДҮe Novak da doД‘e do rekordne 311. nedelje kao najbolji na svetu. U meД‘uvremenu Novak ДҗokoviДҮ nas je navikao da su sportska ДҚuda zapravo normalna stvar.

O tome koliko mu znaДҚi ЕЎto je jutro kada je postao najbolji u istoriji doДҚekao u Beogradu za Oko govori Novak ДҗokoviДҮ a o svim sportskim ДҚudima i rekordima koje je postavio najbolji sportista u istoriji Srbije u studiju RTS-a razgovaraju Branislav Pralica, teniski trener i komentator, blizak Novakov prijatelj i MiloЕЎ KrivokapiДҮ, sportski komentator RTS-a, autor danaЕЎnjeg intervjua sa ДҗokoviДҮem.

https://www.rts.rs/page/tv/sr/story/20/rts-1/4285993/novak-djokovic---niko-i-nikad-kao-on.html

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUДҢAVANJA - Milan DumanoviДҮ: VuДҚiДҮ je eleminisao Belivuka jer se osilio i nije ga viЕЎe sluЕЎao
snippet.description:
Gost emisije вҖңBez ustruДҚavanjaвҖқ bio je nekadaЕЎnji pripadnik Uprave kriminalistiДҚke policije Milan DumanoviДҮ o kojoj nije ЕЎtedeo reДҚi i otvoreno govorio o umeЕЎanosti pripadnika policije i drugih drЕҫavnih institucija u kriminalne radnje, koje se kako kaЕҫe tek otkrivaju. Naime, DumanoviДҮ smatra da su afere tek poДҚele da se otkrivaju i da ДҮe se u narednom periodu tek otkrivati, ЕЎto bi po njegovim reДҚima moglo ozbiljno da uzdrma vlast. Po njegovim reДҚima sukob izmeД‘u NebojЕЎe StefanoviДҮa i Aleksandra VuДҚiДҮa, otkrio je dosadaЕЎnje afere, ali ДҮe nas tek oДҚekivati otkrivanje novih. Milan DumanoviДҮ je sa profesionalne strane komentarisao hapЕЎenje kriminalne grupe Veljka Belivuka, ali i otvoreno govorio o nekadaЕЎnjoj drЕҫavnoj sekretarki Dijani HrkaloviДҮ. Ko su kljuДҚni ljudi iz vrha vlasti, policije, BIA-e, fudbalskog kluba Partizan, koji su bili umeЕЎani sa kriminalnim grupama, saznaДҮete u emisiji. DumanoviДҮ je podsetio da su on i kolega Mladen TrboviДҮ dobili otkaze 2016. godine kada su ukazali na nepravilnosti u radu policije i joЕЎ tada izneli tvrdnje da je Dijana HrkaloviДҮ kako kaЕҫe вҖңprivatizovalaвҖқ policiju. O ovom sluДҚaju o kojem se joЕЎ uvek vodi sudski epilog, ali i o pokretu вҖңOslobodjenjeвҖқ, samo su neke od mnogih tema o kojima je govorio Milan DumanoviДҮ.

snippet.title: Who See i CZIP - Krivolov (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Krivolov je jedan od najveДҮih problema sa kojim se suoДҚava divlji svijet, a meД‘u njima svakako i ptice. Prema procjenama Birdlife Internationala u oblasti Mediterana godiЕЎnje strada oko 25 miliona ptica. To govori o nevjerovatnim razmjerama uticaja ovih ilegalnih aktivnosti na biodiverzitet.
Kampanju protiv krivolova podrzali su naЕЎi dugogodiЕЎnji partneri, organizacija EuroNatur kao i trЕҫni centar Delta city.

Ja sam lovac Luka, dvije rakije sam stuka'
Da tamanim 'tice lakЕЎe, s manje muka
NaniЕЎanim lijepo, ne drhti mi ruka
KreДҮem se kroz ЕЎumu i po nekih ДҚuka
Vabilica radi, a ptica bude glupa
IzreЕЎetam jato, pa to onda skupljam
U tu svrhu, ponekad, povedem i druga
Dva'es kila peradi lovimo iz cuga

Dedduh:
Ja sam prepelica, selica sam ptica
Preletim ti preko brda i ravnica
Perspektiva ptiДҚja, prelijepa je slika
SpuЕЎtim se da kljucnem malo sjemenkica,
bobica, crviДҮa... Po Еҫbunova se viД‘am
sa plastiДҚnim roД‘akom koji ne priДҚa
Okolo se ЕЎuЕЎka, viri cijev iz liЕЎДҮa
NiЕЎani me puЕЎka i obruДҚ se stiska

Ref:
Opalim iz puЕЎke вҖ“ 'tiДҚice baj, baj
Е to to ДҚiniЕЎ, ДҚoДҚe, al' ti nije Еҫa'
ZaЕЎtiДҮena vrsta 'tice mi je na niЕЎan'
GoniДҮe te zakon ako se sazna

Е to to ДҚiniЕЎ, ДҚoДҚe, al' ti nije Еҫa'
ZaЕЎtiДҮena vrsta 'tice mi je na niЕЎan'
ДҢekaj malo ЕЎefe, koji ti je vrag

Dedduh:
Vidim dolje selo k'o svoju trpezu
DoruДҚak i ruДҚak, uЕҫinu i mezu
I da sam ja jelo nekome bilmezu
Е to je kao zamku postavio mreЕҫu
Tuda sam zamica' kad me lovila ta zlica
BjeЕҫala je sa mnom drugarica jarebica
A sve radi vabilica i mreЕҫica i Еҫica
Krijemo se sad iza jednoga kokoЕЎinjca

Noyz:
Kroz durbin vidim fino, pa rijetko profulam
MoguДҮnost 'tici da pretekne svedena na nula
Onda selfi opalim, od sreДҮe viДҚem ura!
'ticu prepariram ili napravim gulaЕЎ
Tako dosta puta i ne zaobiД‘u me
Neke vrste ЕЎto su zakonom zaЕЎtiДҮene
Vabilicom prizvane, lagano uhiДҮene
Ovo zovu KRIVOLOV, no to ne dotiДҚe me

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: Game Recap: Nuggets 103, Grizzlies 102
snippet.description: The Nuggets defeated the Grizzlies, 103-102. Nikola Jokic led the way for the Nuggets with 28 points, 15 rebounds and seven assists, while Michael Porter Jr. added 21 points and nine rebounds in the victory. Ja Morant tallied 16 points, four rebounds and nine assists for the Grizzlies in the losing effort. The Nuggets improve to 22-15 on the season, while the Grizzlies fall to 17-17.

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi
Back vocal: MaЕЎa Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
MusicвҖҷs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee JhenГ© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, sГӨje, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); sГӨje for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: Р“Р»Р°РІРҪРё РҪР°СҒСӮСғРҝ Р”РёР°РҪРёРҪРҫРі СӮРёРјР°! | РҡРҫ СҳРө СғСҖР°РјРёРҫ Р”РёР°РҪСғ?! | Р”РёР°РҪР° СҳРө РұРёР»Р° СҲРҫРәРёСҖР°РҪР°!
snippet.description:
РҹСҖРёРұР»РёР¶Р°РІР° СҒРө РІСҖРөРјРө РіР»Р°РІРҪРҫРі РҪР°СҒСӮСғРҝР° Р”РёР°РҪРёРҪРҫРі СӮРёРјР°. Р”РёР°РҪРө СҳРҫСҲ СғРІРөРә РҪРөРјР°, Р° СҒРІРё РІРөСӣ РҝРҫСҮРёСҡСғ РҙР° РұСҖРёРҪСғ Р°РәРҫ РҝРөСҖС„РҫСҖРјР°РҪСҒ Р·Р°РёСҒСӮР° РҪРө СғСҒРҝРө. Р”РёР°РҪР° СҳРө РёРјР°Р»Р° РјР°Р»Рҫ РІСҖРөРјРөРҪР°, Р°Р»Рё РҪР°РәРҫРҪ РҝСҖРөРіР»РөРҙР° СҒРІРҫРі РҫСҖРјР°СҖР° СҒС…РІР°СӮР° РҙР° СҡРөРҪРҫРі РәРҫСҒСӮРёРјР° РІРёСҲРө РҪРөРјР°! snippet.title: WEB EXTRA: Ring Video Captures Deadly Plane Crash In Pembroke Pines
snippet.description: A small plane has crashed next to North Perry Airport in Pembroke Pines, killing two people, but not before it struck a nearby car injuring a woman and child who were both hospitalized.

snippet.title: KuДҮa od srca S07, porodica VeliДҚkoviДҮ 01  PINK 21. 03. 12h premijerna epizoda porodice VeliДҚkoviДҮ 02
snippet.description: Projekat "KuДҮa od srca" ima za cilj zbrinjavanje najugroЕҫenijih porodica na teritoriji Republike Srbije. Ministarstvo rada i socijalne politike prepoznalo je zajedniДҚke ciljeve i prikljuДҚilo se projektu вҖқ KuДҮa od srca вҖқ u pomoДҮi pri zadovoljavanju osnovnih potreba ugroЕҫenih porodica. Porodice koje su deo projekta вҖқ KuДҮa od srca вҖқ uz podrЕЎku Ministarstva rada i socijalne politike imaju priliku da budu stambeno zbrinute, materijalno potpomognute, vraДҮene u obrazovni sistem ЕЎto rezultira resocijalizacijom svih ДҚlanova porodice uz akcentovanje na najmlaД‘e ДҚlanove druЕЎtva. Osnovna ideja projekta вҖқ KuДҮa od srca вҖқ jeste ukljuДҚivanje celokupne zajednice u pomoДҮ porodicama koje su od strane Ministarstva proglaЕЎene najugroЕҫenijim. Ono ЕЎto izdvaja serijal вҖңKuДҮa od srcaвҖқ, jeste ДҚinjenica da je to prvi domaДҮi rijaliti, koji se pored reЕЎavanja stambenog pitanja kroz graД‘evinske radove, bavi i reЕЎavanjem porodiДҚnih i meД‘uljudskih odnosa. Pravila serijala su jasno definisana i glase: 1. Izgradnja kuДҮe po projektu traje 31dan i ukoliko nije gotova serijal tu zavrЕЎava, objekat ostaje u zateДҚenom stanju, sa porukom da se zajedniica ukljuДҚi I pomogne u zavrЕЎetku radova. 2. Da imaju imovinu najbliЕҫih koji su spremni da je ustupe za izgradnju KuДҮe od srca . 3. NajbliЕҫi ДҚlanovi porodice, prijatelji I komЕЎije moraju imati pozitivno miЕЎljenje o izabranoj porodici. 4. Punoletni ДҚlanovi izabrane porodice moraju biti druЕЎtveno odgovorni : da nisu uЕҫivaoci alkohala, droge kao I da nisu skloni nasilju, a imaju izraЕҫenu crtu o brizi za decu. Ukoliko bilo koji ДҚlan porodice koji je uДҚesnik serijala prekrЕЎi bilo koje pravilo, serijal se prekida istog trenutka kao I sama gradnja.

snippet.title: Manizha - Russian Woman - Russia рҹҮ·рҹҮә - Official Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Manizha will represent Russia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song Russian Woman.

-
Lyrics:
Fields, fields, fields
IвҖҷm so small
Fields, fields, fields
IвҖҷm too small
How do you cross a field through the fire?
How do you cross the field when youвҖҷre alone?

Heeeey?
Should I wait for a helpful hand?
What?
Who will reach out for me, girls?

For ages now
From night till dawn
From the deepest of the night
We are waiting for a ship
A sailing ship
Waiting very much
From night till dawn
Waiting for a ship
Waiting for a ship
But whatвҖҷs the wait?
Stand up, letвҖҷs go!

Every Russian woman
needs to know
You strong enough to bounce against the wall

WhatвҖҷs the rattling about?
Hey, beauty!
Are you waiting for your prince?
Hey, beauty!

YouвҖҷre 30!
Hello? Where are your kids?
You are cute overall
But should lose some weight
Wear something longer
Wear something shorter
Oh you grew up without a father?
You should do what you donвҖҷt want to

You sure you donвҖҷt want to?
DonвҖҷt want to?
You SHOULD!

Listen up, really!
WeвҖҷre not a flock
Hey, crows, shoo!
Leave me alone (give me a break)
Now learn it by heart:
I donвҖҷt blame you for one bit
But I just love myself more

They just fight, always fight
Go round and round to just fight
But never pray
Boy without a father
Girl with no dad
But this broken family
CanвҖҷt break me

-

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUДҢAVANJA - Milan VeruoviДҮ:Od poДҚetka do kraja sve je laЕҫ,Zvezdan JovanoviДҮ nije ubio ДҗinД‘iДҮa
snippet.description:
U najnovijem izdanju emisije "Bez ustruДҚavanja" gost je bio nekadaЕЎnji telohranitelj i prvi pratilac premijera Zorana ДҗinД‘iДҮa Milan VeruoviДҮ. Po VeruoviДҮevom miЕЎljanju zvaniДҚna verzija ubistva premijera nije utemeljena na dokazima i predstavlja deo medijskog spina koji ima za cilj da sakrije istinu. To je pokuЕЎaj takozvanih beneficijera od atentata da prikriju dokaze i prave krivce koji su ubili premijera ДҗinД‘iДҮa. VeruoviДҮ smatra da je istraga vrЕЎena na neadekvatan naДҚin i da nije utvrД‘ena odgovornost onih koji su doprineli da premijer nastrada. Po VeruoviДҮevim reДҚima ДҗinД‘iДҮ je proglasio 2003. godinom u kojoj vlada Srbije treba da izgradi strategiju kako bi Srbija zaЕЎtitila nacionalne interese, kako na Kosovu i Metohiji, tako i u regionu. To nije odgovaralo stranom faktoru koji se okrenuo protiv ДҗinД‘iДҮa. Kada je reДҚ o najbliЕҫem okruЕҫenju premijera ДҗinД‘iДҮa VeruoviДҮ svedoДҚi o njegovom sukobu sa Bebom PopoviДҮem i ДҢedom JovanoviДҮem koji su postali optereДҮenje za politiku koju je vodio premijer. VeruoviДҮ smatra da je neophodno da se otkrije politiДҚka pozadina ubistva premijera, jer samo tako moЕҫemo otkriti i kazniti one koji su odgovorni za smrt Zorana ДҗinД‘iДҮa.

snippet.title: Emanet 138. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 138 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#shorts

snippet.title: Emanet 137. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 137
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#DГјrГјstOlmak

snippet.title: 7 na N1: SteЕҫu obruДҚ oko ministra, steЕҫu i novinare KRIK-a, krik lekara se ne ДҚuje
snippet.description:
SteЕҫe se obruДҚ oko NebojЕЎe StefanoviДҮa, hapse mu bivЕЎe saradnike. SteЕҫu i novinare KRIK-a jer fotografije im neДҮe oprostiti.

Stegla nas je i korona, ali krik lekara izgleda niko ne ДҚuje. Ne ДҚuju ih od pesama Crvene jabuke koja se sluЕЎala na koncertu u Kombank dvorani.

Kako je premijerka ostala bez teksta, zaЕЎto je MiЕЎi VaciДҮu potrebna joЕЎ jedna ДҚaЕЎa vode i kako nam se desio Mauricijus вҖ“ u pregledu nedelje.

snippet.title: Podcast DLZ i Sanda RaЕЎkoviДҮ IviДҮ: Lud je!
snippet.description:
https://nova.rs/video/?ref=yt 
KonaДҚno da Dobar, loЕЎ, zao uДҚine neЕЎto konkretno i dobro za svoju publiku. Ovoga puta, autori prvog srpskog politiДҚkog ЕЎpageti isterna pozivaju svu svoju vernu publiku da im se pridruЕҫe u kolektivnoj terapiji kako bismo pokuЕЎali da ostanemo normalni u ova luda vremena. U tu svrhu, Marko VidojkoviДҮ i Nenad KulaДҚin ugostili su struДҚnjaka i pravog psihijatra - Sandu RaЕЎkoviДҮ IviДҮ. I ЕЎta da vam kaЕҫemo, definitivno - Lud je! To je jedinstveni zakljuДҚak kada je u pitanju KulaДҚin koji udara вҖһbananuвҖң pola metru niЕҫem VidojkoviДҮu, ili kada VidojkoviДҮ ima potrebu da se u istom trenutku pojavi na 13 televizija, odnosno kada obojica imaju konstantnu potrebu za paЕҫnjom i aplauzima.. Da li je u pitanju trauma iz detinjstva ili dugo sticana problematika, to ipak morate da sami vidite uДҚestvovanjem u ovoj ЕЎok-terapiji koju vam od srca poklanjaju DLZ, portal Nova.rs i TV Nova S.

snippet.title: Meghan Markle Says Kate Middleton Made Her Cry Before Wedding
snippet.description:
Meghan Markle is setting the record straight. The former вҖңSuitsвҖқ star spoke with Oprah Winfrey during a bombshell tell-all on CBS, where she addressed a past rumor that she made Kate Middleton cry prior to her wedding to Prince Harry. She said the situation was actually the opposite, and that it was actually Kate who made her cry and that her sister-in-law ended up apologizing.

The former вҖңSuitsвҖқ star spoke with Oprah Winfrey during a bombshell tell-all on CBS, where she addressed a past rumor that she made Kate Middleton cry prior to her wedding to Prince Harry. She said the situation was actually the opposite, and that it was actually Kate who made her cry and that her sister-in-law ended up apologizing.

snippet.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle speak out
snippet.description:

Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Vojislav Е eЕЎelj - Arkan i GiЕЎka su bili strah i trepet, ja sam bio opasniji! (14.3.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je prof. dr Vojislav Е eЕЎelj, predsednik Srpske radikalne stranke. Kao najmlaД‘i doktor nauka u SFRJ skrenuo je paЕҫnju na sebe nastupima u kojima je kritikovao komunistiДҚki reЕҫim zbog ДҚega i osuД‘en na zatvorsku kaznu. Nakon izlaska iz zatvora nastavlja i pojaДҚava disidentsku retoriku i poziva Srbe da se vrate sebi i odbace titoizam. DrЕҫao je predavanja u SAD, gde je govorio srpskoj emigraciji. MomДҚilo ДҗujiДҮ ga je proglasio ДҚetniДҚkim vojvodom. Pozivao je izmeЕЎtanje Brozovog groba iz Beograda. PoДҚetkom raspada Jugoslavije pozivao je Srbe na borbu i stvaranje Velike Srbije. Slao je dobrovoljce na front i obilazio poloЕҫaje srpskih snaga. U Srbiji je bio opozicija reЕҫimu Slobodana MiloЕЎeviДҮa, ali kako je sam govorio, uvek konstruktivna. U toku politiДҚkog delovanja upoznao je i dosta ljudi s one strane zakona, a s nekima poput Arkana i GiЕЎke ulazio je u otvoreni sukob, na ivici fiziДҚkog. Komentarisao je kriminalne obraДҚune devedesetih, ДҚesto iznoseДҮi u javnost ekskluzivne informacije o sluДҚajevima, navodeДҮi da ih dobija od "Laufera". Tokom agresije 1999. godine bio je potpredsednik Vlade, ali i veliki protivnik Kumanovskog sporazuma, apelujuДҮi da je trebalo istrajati duЕҫe u otporu agresoru. Nakon petoktobarskih promena o kojima govori da su bili istorijska greЕЎka srpskog naroda bio je opozicija reЕҫimu i veliki kritizer vlade Zorana ДҗinД‘iДҮa. Sam je priznao da je imao kontakt i sa voД‘ama Zemunskog klana. Nakon objavljivanja optuЕҫnice HaЕЎkog tribunala protiv njega odluДҚio je da tamo i ode najavljujuДҮi krvavo proleДҮe u Srbiji. Ubrzo nakon toga je likvidiran premijer ДҗinД‘iДҮ. U toku njegovog procesa u Hagu njegova stranka se podelila i deo ДҚlanstva na ДҚelu s Tomislavom NikoliДҮem i Aleksandrom VuДҚiДҮem osnovao je Srpsku naprednu stranku. Iz HaЕЎkog tribunala je kako kaЕҫe izbaДҚen, jer nisu znali ЕЎta viЕЎe da rade sa njim. Napisao je veДҮi broj knjiga, od "Ideologije srpskog nacionalizma" do mnogih knjiga beskompromisnih naslova kojima kritikuje konkretne liДҚnosti. Iz politiДҚke biografije izdvaja se i sledeДҮe: ДҚetiri puta je bio kandidat za predsednika Republike Srbije. Obavljao je duЕҫnost potpredsednika Vlade Republike Srbije, a u periodu od 1996. do 1998. bio je predsednik opЕЎtine Zemun. PreporuДҚujemo da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viЕЎe o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 05.03.2021. godine u prostorijama Srpske radikalne stranke, u Zemunu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar PavkoviДҮ.

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Еҫele da pomognu rad naЕЎe produkcije to mogu uДҚiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. TrudiДҮemo se da ostanemo dosledni naЕЎoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i ЕЎirenju istine bez cenzure.
